highlightedText: Why do some people sneeze so loudly?
Why do some people sneeze so loudly?

text: Why do some people sneeze so loudly?

highlightedText: Why do some people sneeze so loudly?

text: which then triggers reflexive muscle contractions
These contractions determine the speed and force of the sneeze. The louder the sneeze, the stronger the muscle contractions are likely to be.
